run_summary.summary:
Two substantive updates today, plus a correction flag from the previous run. 💼

**Whisker (Litter-Robot):** Invoice is officially in accounting! Cheyenne confirmed she submitted it this morning and said payment will come via ACH through Tipalti. We're waiting on the payment — I've moved the card to Invoiced and set a 30-day follow-up. Love that Kenny closed the invoice email with a genuine plug for working together again — great relationship energy.

**JLab:** Liz completed the Tipalti payment portal registration this afternoon (account created + payment details set). JLab can now process the ACH payment. If an invoice is already out, it should move through the portal now.

**⚠️ Previous run correction:** Last run incorrectly attributed the Whisker/ACH conversation to JLab, labeling Cheyenne Mabey (cmabey@whisker.com) as a JLab contact. The Cheyenne note in the JLab card from the previous run is actually about the Whisker deal. Please review and clean up the JLab notes if needed.

suggestions.message: ⚠️ The previous run added a note to JLab saying 'Liz confirmed ACH with Cheyenne at JLab' — but Cheyenne Mabey is at Whisker (cmabey@whisker.com), not JLab. The ACH conversation was about the Whisker/Litter-Robot deal. Worth removing or correcting that note from the JLab card so there's no confusion.

Cheyenne submitted the Whisker invoice to accounting today and said Tipalti invite is coming — Liz will need to set up a Whisker Tipalti account separately from the JLab one. Watch for that invite, it'll be from a different portal URL. Payment follow-up set for May 27 if nothing arrives by then. 💸

JLab Tipalti registration is complete — payment setup is done on our end. If there's an outstanding invoice with JLab, it should flow through now. Invoice goes to apinvoice@jlab.com (PDF/JPG/PNG only), portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab.

deals.next_action: Follow up on payment if not received
deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Cheyenne (Whisker) confirmed invoice submitted to accounting — ACH payment coming via Tipalti (Whisker's payment platform). Watch for Tipalti registration invite from Whisker (separate from JLab's Tipalti portal). | [Apr 24]: Kenny sent invoice to Cheyenne for post that went live week of Apr 21. Kenny's email also expressed interest in future collabs.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Cheyenne confirmed invoice submitted to accounting — ACH/Tipalti payment in progress. Follow up May 27 if payment hasn't arrived.

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Liz completed JLab Tipalti payment portal registration — account created and payment details (ACH) submitted. JLab can now process payment. Invoice goes to apinvoice@jlab.com (PDF, JPG, or PNG only). Portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab. NOTE: The 'ACH confirmed with Cheyenne' note from the previous run belongs to the Whisker deal (Cheyenne Mabey, cmabey@whisker.com) — not JLab.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Liz completed Tipalti registration for JLab — ACH payment setup confirmed and ready to receive payment.
